positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest at night. Giant glowing mushrooms illuminate the scene, and tiny, glowing fae creatures flit among the roots. Style of Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, vibrant jewel tones, digital painting, high detail, ethereal atmosphere.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, harsh lighting
